d: Igor summons a tombstone where he stands when a battle starts. Every time an enemy hero loses [[40%]] of their HP, Igor summons another tombstone on an empty tile closest to this enemy which will disappear after receiving [[3]] normal attacks. Igor will always stand on the tombstone and remain [[steadfast]]. Igor deals [[150%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies upon casting this skill.
Increases damage to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[270%]]<ATK>.

Igor activates all tombstones every [[8]]s or whenever he casts Funereal Ring. He jumps onto an activated tombstone, dealing [[140%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies and deactivating the tombstone. While casting this skill, Igor gains damage immunity and becomes untargetable. If he jumps onto a tombstone activated by Funereal Ring, he deals an extra [[50%]] damage.
Increases damage to [[150%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[170%]]<ATK>.

Igor jumps onto another tombstone to dodge a fatal blow and gains damage immunity while using this skill. Each time Igor uses Ghastly Explosion or Specter Guard to jump between tombstones, he recovers [[3%]]<HP> HP. After casting Specter Guard [[6]] times, each subsequent cast increases the HP loss ratio required to summon a tombstone with Funereal Ring by [[12%]].
Increases HP recovery to [[3.5%]]<HP>.
Increases HP recovery to [[4%]]<HP>.
Increases HP recovery to [[4.5%]]<HP>.
Igor increases his Life Drain by [[7]] during battle. His Life Drain is increased by an extra [[6]] when triggering Specter Guard for the first time.
Igor increases his Life Drain by [[10]] during battle. His Life Drain is increased by an extra [[8]] when triggering Specter Guard for the first time.
Igor increases his Life Drain by [[12]] during battle. His Life Drain is increased by an extra [[10]] when triggering Specter Guard for the first time.
Igor extends the range of Ghastly Explosion by 1 tile and reduces the targets' healing received by [[50%]] for [[4]]s when his HP ratio is above [[70%]].
Reduces the targets' healing received for [[5]]s.
Enhances Ghastly Explosion once with each cast of Specter Guard, regardless of Igor's HP ratio.
Reduces the targets' healing received for [[6]]s.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 15 Life Drain, 10 Execution.

d: Igor summons an extra tombstone with Funereal Ring on the tile with the most surrounding enemies when a battle starts.
